title: Wandering Ronin
description: Adds japanese ronin into the game to add more atmosphere to the world!
body:
###

This mod adds adds Wandering Ronin into Minecraft, inspired by Ghost Of Tsushima. 

Report bugs here

 
This Mod Follows the GNU Public License V3.



Features:

This is a mod adds wandering ronin that spawn all over the overworld.
They wont attack the player unless provoked, and they attack monsters as they roam.
Ronin will attack each other in the world.
When killed they drop their katana and kimono.
